description: Interpret research relating to nutrition during the aging process. Gain an understanding of acute and chronic conditions in older persons, both in hospital and the community. Examine the impact of aging on organ systems and address the relationship among physiologic aging, nutrition, and disease.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Clinical Nutrition MS or the Capstone Certificate in Clinical Nutrition

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Clinical Nutrition MS or the Capstone Certificate in Clinical Nutrition
